reviews.review_description:
So much went wrong with my experience with this app, and this company.
Initially, I loved my free trial...then it started. I paid the full price of the app of 284.00.  I went to use the very expensive app and was never granted access.  I complained for over 2 weeks. The said they couldn't find that I paid for it anywhere. After at least 15 emails , I threatened to report them for wire fraud....THEN and only then, were they able to "find me" and granted me my refund.
They also offered me 6 mos. free. I was never able to access my own account again. 
And I DID love the experiences in the app. But definitely had the worst experience with the company. This, during a personal tragedy of my own, and desperately needing stress relief.
I do not recommend.

The videos in the app will play for about a second and keep resetting and repeating. One video wouldn't play at all and after selecting a different video it would play the first second of the other video and just keep repeating. Would love to see the app when it's working. Hopefully this gets fixed so I can revisit it.

developer_response.body: Hi there! A reminder the videos have to be downloaded *one at a time* over a stable wifi connection or they won't play properly. Can you email hello@story-up.com so we can fix this for you? And if you're using an EEG headband, the experience will stop and start or dim with your brain patterns (feelings of positivity). Think of those feelings like a gas pedal.  Delete the videos and redownload them one at a time and let us know if this fixes it and let us know whether you're using a headband as if so, the experience is supposed to stop and start according to your brain patterns. Thanks for letting us know!

reviews.review_description: I think they are still around, they should release a quest port, but this is all very professionally done. I'm suere it wants you to pay to upgrade somewhere, but you get at least one hit for free.

developer_response.body: Hi Byte frame!  We're happy to give you a free trial if you'd like to access the pro version of Healium. You can email us at hello@tryhealium.com .  There are about 30 experiences on the pro version. Nice to meet you!

reviews.review_description: Ok, I can try again as long as I can download the content when I leave the app or remove the headset as downloading takes a long time. Is this possible? Thanks..

developer_response.body: Yes. Did you get our previous tip? Try putting a piece of masking tape over the Oculus proximity forehead sensor inside the goggles so the goggles don't go to sleep. Remember to take off the tape after you're finished downloading otherwise it will drain the batteries. Please email us at hello@story-up.com as we'd like to make this right for you. There are also some great tips here. https://basereality.co/blogs/guides/improve-oculus-go-battery-life-simple-tricks-you-can-use-now  .  Were you able to try any of these? We'd be happy to give you a free trial of Healium's Pro version of our app. This is the free version. Just email us at hello@story-up.com and we'll get you access to our Pro version.

reviews.review_description: Just soso

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, Revi HTC. This is the free version of our app. If you'd like to power Healium with your brainwaves using an EEG headband, go to https://www.tryhealium.com/ In the early days, our content was limited but now we have three times the content on Healium Pro. I hope you have a chance to discover all of the many layers of Healium. Let me know if you'd like a free trial of Healium Pro.  Thanks for stopping by!

reviews.review_description: using direct personal data in the experience helps to feel even more connected
I had this on oculus go until it broke 😔 Can I transfer this to the quest 2 I recently bought?
By StoryUp. Virtual portal of videos for therapy. TRT 70 min.

developer_response.body: Thanks Matthew! So appreciate you checking out Healium.

reviews.review_description: Very calming. I always had trouble quieting my mind and didn't sleep well. This helps to stop that and to sleep peacefully. I was shocked as I expected it not to work for me. Glad that I have it a try. Now a fan.

developer_response.body: Before sleep is a great way to use Healium. Try the Aurora Borealis or the Crystal forest....two of our favorites. Thanks for your feedback. We appreciate the good and the bad to make our products better.

reviews.review_description: I used this platform throughout my pregnancy and during labor and is helped to manage my high blood pressure and to work through contractions without using medication or an epidural.  It would help to quickly recover from intense pain and recenter my focus drastically.  I highly recommend even just giving this a try to help with anxiety, pain management, health issue…anything really.  Even just for meditation focus.

developer_response.body: oh wow... how wonderful! I hope you and your little one are doing well. Congratulations on your new bundle of joy and we're glad Healium could distract you. I wish I would have had VR when I was going through labor.

reviews.review_description: Great experience! Amazing use of tech for destressing and refocusing.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the love! Starting March 31st, you can power Healium with a Brainlink Lite EEG headband. If you'd like information on how to get a headband at a 50% off discount, just email us at hello@story-up.com .

reviews.review_description: When compatibility with muse 2 ?

developer_response.body: Very sorry but we've learned that Muse has stopped manufacturing the Muse 1 headband and it SDK is no longer supported. The Muse 2 SDK is also not supported for Healium.  We have switched headband vendors to the Brainlink Lite EEG headband. We apologize for the inconvenience. If you need information on how to get a 50% off discount on a Brainlink Lite EEG headband or have additional concerns, please email us at hello@story-up.com

reviews.review_description: I use this with my patients for Neuro feedback that they can continue at home.

Love the concept but all my scenes stop & restart after a few minutes. I’m on Go with internet & iPhone 7. Is that supposed to happen in the free version? Do you have to buy the pro version for full access?

developer_response.body: Are you using an EEG headband? If you're *not* using the headband and the videos stop, delete the video and redownload it over a stable wifi connection to ensure smooth playback. If you are using an EEG headband, yes... the experiences are supposed to stop and start depending on your brain patterns. That's the feedback loop. Can you email us at hello@story-up.com so we can fix this for you? If your brainwaves are above the threshold line, the experience will move forward. The headband is measuring gamma asymmetry which is associated with feelings of positivity.  Recall a happy memory or a time when you felt love, joy or appreciation and notice how the waves react to your thoughts.  If your brainwaves are a flat line instead of a wavy line, that's forehead tension. Relax and take a few deep breaths until your lines turn wavy again. If you still have questions, please email us at hello@story-up.com as we'd love to share more about how you can use Healium. The Pro version of Healium has twice the content and more brain pattern protocols (after March 31 2020)   Thanks!

reviews.review_description: There a lot of audio options apps for mindfulness, but this is a great option to really get immersed in a mindful experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks! You can learn more here tryhealium.com

reviews.review_description: Quite a lot of time and effort spent to install only to have this fail to load numerous times. I have no doubt it’s a great programme of scenes, and I am sure when it works it’s wonderful, but unfortunately for me, none of the few free scenes in the light version loaded. From the preview and other reviews I think programs like this are the reason I bought the GO. I’m interested in using mindfulness applications in a therapeutic setting, and from all accounts the full version is underpinned by extensive research. This version seems not to be as successful.

developer_response.body: Very sorry, Gigi, you're having an issue. Let's fix that for you right away. The videos have to be downloaded one at a time over a stable wifi connection. If you click away from the thumbnail during the download it interrupts the download and the video won't play.  Can you email us and we'll give you access to our pro version so you can experience ALL of our content? hello@tryhealium.com If you click "delete" on the individual video and try again, you can redownload it. Thanks for sharing your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I think you need the headband to enjoy this. It’s just really like any other relaxation device without it. And there are better ones than this.

developer_response.body: We are very Sorry Jens the free version of Healium didn't meet your expectations. Would you like a free trial of our Pro version of Healium?  The Pro version not only has the ability to power Healium with an EEG headband (after March 31st 2020 w/ a Brainlink Lite), but three times the amount of experiences.  If you'd like a free trial version of our Pro app, please email me at hello@story-up.com . We so appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback with us! Positive vibes to you.

reviews.review_description: V disappointing - none of the scenes load

developer_response.body: You have to download the videos first before you play them. There is no streaming. Can you email us at hello@story-up.com so we can fix this for you? All of the scenes are loading on our end so your information would be helpful for us to trouble shoot. Thanks much for letting us know.

reviews.review_description: Downloaded videos won’t play.

developer_response.body: So sorry Aaron that you're having an issue. You can only download the videos no more than 3 at a time or it overloads the system. Can you delete the video, and redownload it ensuring that you're on a stable wifi connection? Please email us at hello@story-up.com and we're happy to troubleshoot individually for you. Thank you for taking the time to give us this feedback!

reviews.review_description: And the beautiful triple rainbows at the end
